---
# Search-activity exhibit. Google "My Activity" search & web feed
# from Google Takeout. Reverse-chronological list of search queries,
# visited URLs, and app actions tagged by source app (Search,
# Chrome, Maps, Assistant).
#
# Render with:  quarto render exhibit-search-activity.qmd

format: warrant-vignette-typst
document-types:
  - attachment
  - exhibit

# ---- Header consistency ----
state: "Indiana"
county: "Pawnee County"
city: "Pawnee"
detective-name: "Detective B. Macklin"
case-number: "CR24-087"

# ---- Exhibit content ----
exhibit-description: |
  Attached is an extract of the Google "My Activity" feed for the
  Subject Account, showing search queries, visited URLs, and
  Maps / Assistant actions in the days surrounding the incident.

exhibit-type: search-activity
exhibit-title: "Google My Activity -- Search & Browsing"
account-id: "104871329500981"

# Records live in a separate YAML data file because Pandoc's typst
# metadata writer drops the dict contents for this record schema.
exhibit-records-file: "data/exhibit-search-activity-records.yaml"
---
